Who We Are

Bridging the Digital Divide in Pakistan.

DEVA — Digital Empowerment and Vocational Academy is a pioneering institution based in Buner, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, operating at the intersection of technology education, vocational training, and community transformation.

We deliver internationally recognized programs that unlock economic opportunities for youth and women in one of Pakistan's most underserved regions. Our practical skill-building combined with entrepreneurship mentorship creates job-ready graduates who drive local development.

With backing from the European Union, UNODC, NACTA, and the University of Buner, DEVA operates with global standards and an unwavering focus on measurable human impact.

Our Mission

Equip underserved youth and women with digital and vocational skills that open pathways to sustainable livelihoods.

Our Vision

A digitally empowered Pakistan where every individual can thrive in the knowledge economy.

Accredited

Internationally recognized curricula developed with EU and UN partner organizations.

Inclusive

Gender-responsive programs with flexible home-based learning options designed for every woman.

View All Programs Partner With Us

What We Offer

Programs Built for the Future.

Designed with industry experts and international partners for maximum real-world impact. Filter by category to find your program.

⭐ Most Popular
Digital Skills 6 Months

Web Development & Design

Master HTML, CSS, JavaScript and modern frameworks. Build professional websites and launch a freelance career on Upwork and Fiverr.

  • Frontend & Backend Development
  • UI/UX Fundamentals
  • Freelancing Platforms (Upwork, Fiverr)
  • Portfolio Project & Certificate
30 seats available Apply Now
Digital Skills 4 Months

Digital Marketing & E-Commerce

SEO, social media, Google Ads and e-commerce strategies to grow businesses and earn income online.

  • Social Media & Content Marketing
  • Google Ads & Analytics
  • Shopify / WooCommerce
25 seats available Apply Now
Digital Skills 3 Months

Data Science & AI Fundamentals

Python programming, data analysis, machine learning basics and AI tools for Pakistan's emerging tech sector.

  • Python Programming
  • Data Visualization
  • AI Tools & Prompting
20 seats available Apply Now
Vocational 5 Months

Technical & Solar Energy Training

Hands-on electrical systems and solar panel installation aligned with Pakistan's growing renewable energy sector.

  • Solar Energy Systems
  • Electrical Wiring & Safety
  • Industry Certification
20 seats available Apply Now
Women's Track 4 Months

Women's Digital Skills & Home Business

Flexible home-based learning enabling women to build online businesses and earn income independently.

  • Online Selling & E-Commerce
  • Graphic Design (Canva / AI)
  • Financial Literacy
40 seats available Apply Now
Entrepreneurship 3 Months

Youth Startup & Entrepreneurship Lab

From idea to pitch deck — business planning, seed funding access and KPK's first rural startup mentorship network.

  • Business Model Canvas
  • Pitch & Fundraising
  • Mentorship Network
25 seats available Apply Now
Gender Equity Initiative

Empowering Women, One Skill at a Time.

DEVA believes women's economic empowerment is the most powerful driver of community development. Our gender-responsive programs remove every barrier to learning and earning.

Learn from Home

Flexible blended learning designed around family responsibilities and cultural context.

Safe Environment

Female instructors, gender-segregated classes, and family-consent programs available.

Stipend Support

Need-based financial stipends for women from low-income households through donor partnerships.

Meet the Team

The People Behind DEVA.

Our dedicated team of educators, mentors and administrators work tirelessly to empower every student.

Dr. Ahmad Nawaz

Founder & Executive Director

Former software engineer turned development champion. 15+ years in ICT for development across Pakistan.

Sadia Bibi

Head of Women's Programs

Dedicated to removing barriers for women in education. Developed the home-based learning model used across KPK.

Imran Khan

Lead Instructor — Web Development

Full-stack developer and certified trainer with experience working with Pakistan's top tech companies.

Nadia Gul

Program Coordinator

Manages student enrollment, partnerships and program logistics. Dedicated to ensuring a seamless experience for every student.

Success Stories

Voices of Transformation.

Real graduates. Real results. Every number represents a changed life.

"
Web Development Graduate

"I was a daily wage laborer with no prospects. After completing DEVA's web development course, I now earn PKR 80,000/month freelancing on Upwork. My family's life has completely transformed. DEVA gave me a career I never thought was possible living in Buner."

AK

Our Network

Trusted by Global Leaders.

DEVA's work is backed by world-class international organizations committed to digital empowerment and human development.

European Union

Primary international donor supporting digital empowerment programs under the EU-Pakistan cooperation framework.

International Donor

UNODC

United Nations Office on Drugs and Crime — supporting youth engagement and alternative livelihood programs.

UN Agency

NACTA Pakistan

National Counter Terrorism Authority — partnering on youth resilience through technology education programs.

Government of Pakistan

University of Buner

Academic partner providing curriculum validation, faculty support and degree pathway recognition for graduates.

Academic Partner

UN Women

Scaling gender-responsive digital programs and women's entrepreneurship initiatives across KPK.

UN Agency

UNDP Pakistan

Supporting sustainable development goals through vocational training and employment generation at DEVA.

News & Events.

View All News
Partnership
February 15, 2025

EU Renews 3-Year Digital Skills Partnership with DEVA

The European Union has announced a renewed three-year commitment, funding expansion of digital skills training to 5 new districts across KPK — reaching an additional 5,000 youth and women in underserved communities.

Read Full Story

200 Women Graduate from Digital Skills Program

A landmark graduation ceremony in Buner where 200 women received internationally recognized digital certifications.

Meet Lina — Your Personal DEVA Guide.

Not sure which program is right for you? Lina is DEVA's AI-powered program advisor, available 24/7 to answer every question — from eligibility to enrollment, scholarships to schedules.

Ask anything, get instant answers

Program details, fees, timings, eligibility — Lina knows it all.

Chat comfortably in your own language, no barriers.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions.

Any youth aged 15–35 or women of any age from KPK or surrounding regions can apply. No prior digital experience is required — just a willingness to learn and grow.

Many DEVA programs are fully subsidized through EU and partner funding. Need-based stipends are also available for eligible applicants from low-income households.

Yes! DEVA offers flexible home-based and blended learning options designed around family responsibilities. Female instructors and fully online classes are available for women who prefer this model.

DEVA provides internationally recognized certificates backed by EU and UN partner organizations, as well as academic recognition from the University of Buner for eligible programs.

Yes — DEVA provides active job placement support including employer introductions, CV coaching, freelancing platform onboarding (Upwork/Fiverr), and a strong alumni mentorship network.

DEVA provides access to computer labs at our center. Selected students may also receive laptops on loan. Please mention your equipment situation in your application form.

Programs range from 3 to 6 months depending on the track. Each includes practical modules, weekly check-ins, guest speakers, and a final capstone project or assessment.

Fill out the application form below or visit our office in Daggar, Buner. Our team will contact you within 48 hours to guide you through the enrollment process and answer any questions.

Ready to Start?

Applications are open for upcoming cohorts. Our admissions team will contact you within 48 hours.

Apply Now
  • 48-hour response guarantee
  • International certificates
  • Equipment support available
  • Stipends for eligible students

Support Our Mission

Your Donation Changes Lives.

Every contribution directly funds scholarships, equipment, and training for youth and women who cannot afford education. 100% of donations go towards student support programs.

PKR 5,000
Covers one month of internet and materials for a student
PKR 15,000
Provides a full laptop loan for one student's entire program
PKR 50,000
Sponsors one complete training program for a woman in Buner
